title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50 argues that humans remain more reliable than AI at editing complex documents like .docx files because documents have internal structure and logic that AI struggles to preserve reliably. The talk emphasizes that reliable document editing at scale requires treating documents as structured software rather than plain text files.
